title: RRT Management — Rapid Reliable
summary: Cross-platform fleet operations app for managing trucks, loads, expenses, drivers, and driver payments.
details:
RRT Management

Cross-platform fleet operations app built with .NET MAUI for managing trucks, loads, expenses, drivers, and driver payments.

  • Dashboard for operational overview
  • Truck, load, and expense management
  • Driver payment tracking
  • Add flows for trucks, loads, expenses, payments, and drivers

Tech: .NET 9 / .NET MAUI, MVVM with CommunityToolkit.Mvvm, LiteDB, CommunityToolkit.Maui, Syncfusion.Maui.Toolkit.

Repo: View on GitHub

title: PTO Tracker System
summary: A PTO tracking web app with role-based dashboards for HR, managers, and employees, plus leave policy management and request approvals.
details:
PTO Tracker System

A web application that streamlines PTO management across HR, manager, and employee roles.

  • Role-based dashboards (HR, Manager, Employee)
  • Create/manage leave policies
  • Submit, approve, and deny PTO requests
  • Centralized visibility into balances and statuses

Tech: Tech Stack: HTML/CSS/JS, React, Node, Sqlite)

Repo: View on GitHub

summary: A personal portfolio website built with HTML/CSS/JS featuring project details and a downloadable resume.
details:
Project Alpha

Full description of the project. Tech: HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Highlights: responsive layout, projects JSON loader, modal for details.
